title: Voltic
description: Voltic is a next-gen and thoroughly researched Minecraft Optimization mod pack
body:
![Voltic Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29fb9a7c6fd2a7761b4edbf696a22ed8bcae3782.png)

**Voltic** is a next-generation and throughly researched performance optimization mod-pack. 

**Voltic** combines mods from all over the community by esteemed mod-developers to give you just the perfect Minecraft performance.

The mod-pack is powered by **VulkanMod** which changes Minecraft's rendering engine <u>from OpenGL to Vulkan</u>. VulkanMod is a relatively newer mod, which is still in its experimental phase, but has produced some magical results.

A very glaring drawback of the VulkanMod ecosystem is that it has an extensive list of mod incompatibilities. **Voltic** aims to carefully research mods which help you the most, while keeping them compatible with VulkanMod.

Using **Voltic** does not guarantee a definite performance boost over Sodium-based optimization modpacks, as some devices run Vulkan better, and some OpenGL. It is upto you to choose the optimum solution for yourself.

<details>
<summary>Included Mods</summary>
  
- **VulkanMod** – Replaces OpenGL with Vulkan for improved rendering performance and efficiency.

- **BadOptimizations** – Removes inefficient and redundant game code to enhance FPS and stability.

- **ClothConfigAPI** – Provides an easy-to-use configuration system for other mods.

- **C2ME (Concurrent Chunk Management Engine)** – Optimizes chunk loading and multithreading to speed up world generation and improve server performance.

- **EntityCulling** – Prevents the rendering of entities that are not visible to the player, boosting FPS.

- **FabricAPI** – A core library that provides essential tools and compatibility support for Fabric mods.

- **FerriteCore** – Reduces memory usage by optimizing how game objects are stored and accessed.

- **Krypton** – Improves network performance by optimizing packet handling and server connections.

- **Lithium** – Enhances physics calculations, entity AI, and game logic to reduce CPU load and improve performance.

- **ModernFix** – Fixes inefficiencies in Java’s garbage collection and memory handling, reducing lag and improving overall stability.

- **MoreCulling** – Expands on vanilla culling mechanics to remove unnecessary rendering and improve FPS.

- **Noisium** – Optimizes terrain noise calculations, making world generation faster and smoother.

- **VMP (Very Many Players)** – Enhances server performance, particularly in multiplayer settings with many players.

- **AlternateCurrent** – Rewrites Redstone logic for better efficiency, reducing lag caused by complex Redstone circuits.

- **Cull Leaves** – Reduces the rendering of unseen leaf blocks, improving performance in forested areas.

- **ParticleCore** – Optimizes how Minecraft handles particles, reducing their impact on performance.

</details>

Since VulkanMod changes the Minecraft renderer to Vulkan, instead of OpenGL, mods which make direct calls to OpenGL are not supported. A major mod affected by the change is **Sodium**.

As of now, **Voltic** aims just at improving the overall performance of the game, <u>without providing any QoL improvements in the game</u>, which include the features added by **OptiFine**.


<details>
<summary>FAQs</summary>

**Q: Is this going to work on my device?**

**A: Voltic** should work fine on your device if your GPU supports the Vulkan Renderer. You can find an extensive list of supported GPUs [here](https://vulkan.gpuinfo.org/listdevices.php).

**Q: This does not affect my performance!**

**A:** The Vulkan Renderer may have different effects on different GPUs and devices. If **Voltic** doesn't seem to work for you, you may switch over to a Sodium ecosystem.

**Q: What are the specifications of the device Voltic was tested on?**

**A:** CPU: Intel Core i5-1135G7 11th Gen, GPU: Nvidia GeForce MX330, RAM: 8GB

**Q: What does Voltic mean?**

**A:** Voltic stands for "Vulkan-optimized lightweight tweaks for improved computing".
</details>
